name: I'm behind the mountain on Mountain View
description: I'm behind the mountain on Mountain View
hints: Behind the mountain on Mountain View road. Both directions lead back to the same place.
EAST and WEST both return to Main & Mountain View. This is where the mine shaft door exits to.
Both EAST and WEST go to Main & Mountain View (room 4). You end up here after going through the stone door in the mine shaft.
notes: Behind the mountain on Mountain View. Both EAST and WEST lead to Main & Mountain View (room 4). Reached by going through the stone door in the mine shaft (room 14) or from Main & Mountain View.
